add/beyond the safe-integer edge rounds.reason: Python int arithmetic is exact (arbitrary precision), not double-rounded

div/zero divisor yields Infinity.reason: Python native / raises ZeroDivisionError on a zero divisor

number/empty string coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: empty input must not silently zero downstream arithmetic (matches the Perl port)

number/null coerces to 0.reason: deliberate: unset props must not silently zero downstream arithmetic (matches the Perl port)

string/null renders as the string \"null.reason: deliberate: an unset prop must not surface a literal "null" in HTML (matches the Perl port)

sort/localeCompare orders case-insensiti.reason: Python str comparison is codepoint order, not ICU collation

sort/relational compare on numeric strin.reason: the "auto" compare goes numeric when both keys look_like_number (Perl/Go parity)

reduce/numeric-string items concatenate.reason: numeric folds parse numeric strings instead of concatenating (Perl/Go parity)
